name: Generate Invoice Number
script:
company = frappe.form_dict.get('company')

# Define abbreviations for specific companies
if company == "CITYWALK FOOTWEAR PVT LTD":
    abbr = "CW/EX"
elif company == "Royal Pacific Private Limited":
    abbr = "R/EXP"
elif company == "GL GENERAL TRADING Mogadishu":
    abbr = "GLI/EXP"
else:
    abbr = frappe.db.get_value('Company', company, 'abbr')

if not abbr:
    frappe.throw(_('Company abbreviation not found'))

# Get the current fiscal year
current_date = frappe.utils.today()
current_fiscal_year = frappe.db.get_value('Fiscal Year', {
    'year_start_date': ['<=', current_date],
    'year_end_date': ['>=', current_date]
}, 'name')

if not current_fiscal_year:
    frappe.throw(_('Fiscal Year not found for the current date'))

# Check if the company's country is India
country = frappe.db.get_value('Company', company, 'country')
if country == "India":
    # Format fiscal year for India as "24-25"
    start_year = current_fiscal_year.split('-')[0][-2:]
    end_year = f"{int(start_year) + 1:02d}"
    formatted_fiscal_year = f"{start_year}-{end_year}"
else:
    formatted_fiscal_year = current_fiscal_year

# Define cutoff date - hard reset from this date onwards
CUTOFF_DATE = frappe.utils.getdate("2026-02-01")
today_date = frappe.utils.getdate(frappe.utils.today())

if today_date >= CUTOFF_DATE:
    # After cutoff date: get invoices created on or after the cutoff date only
    last_invoice = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT name, custom_invoice_no
        FROM `tabSales Invoice`
        WHERE company = %s 
        AND custom_invoice_no LIKE %s
        AND creation >= %s
        AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(custom_invoice_no, '/', 1), '-', -1) REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
        ORDER BY
            CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(custom_invoice_no, '/', 1), '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    """, (company, f"{abbr}%/{formatted_fiscal_year}", CUTOFF_DATE), as_dict=True)
    
    if last_invoice:
        last_number_part = last_invoice[0].custom_invoice_no.split('-')[1].split('/')[0]
        new_number = int(last_number_part) + 1
    else:
        # No invoices created after cutoff, start from 1
        new_number = 1
else:
    # Before cutoff date: use old logic
    last_invoice = frappe.db.sql("""
        SELECT name, custom_invoice_no
        FROM `tabSales Invoice`
        WHERE company = %s 
        AND custom_invoice_no LIKE %s
        AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(custom_invoice_no, '/', 1), '-', -1) REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
        ORDER BY
            CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(custom_invoice_no, '/', 1), '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    """, (company, f"{abbr}%/{formatted_fiscal_year}"), as_dict=True)
    
    if last_invoice:
        last_number_part = last_invoice[0].custom_invoice_no.split('-')[1].split('/')[0]
        new_number = int(last_number_part) + 1
    else:
        new_number = 1

# Generate the new invoice number
new_invoice_no = f"{abbr}-{new_number:03d}/{formatted_fiscal_year}"

# Set the generated invoice number as the response
frappe.response['message'] = new_invoice_no

name: Get Conversion Factors From Items
script:
item_code=frappe.form_dict.get("item_code")

try:
        # Fetch the item document
    item = frappe.get_doc("Item", item_code)

    # List to store UOM conversions
    uom_conversions = []

    # Iterate through UOM Conversions child table
    uom_conversions = {}

    # Iterate through UOM Conversions child table
    for row in item.uoms:
        uom_conversions[row.uom.lower()] = row.conversion_factor


    frappe.response['message']=uom_conversions
except Exception as e:
    frappe.log_error(frappe.get_traceback(), "Error")
    frappe.throw("Error occurred while fetching UOM conversions")

name: Update Incoming Rate on Sales Invoice
script:
def update_incoming_rate(doc, method=None):
    purchase_invoices = doc.purchase_receipts

    if not purchase_invoices:
        return

    for purchase_invoice in purchase_invoices:
        doctype = purchase_invoice.receipt_document_type
        docname = purchase_invoice.receipt_document
        doc = frappe.get_doc(doctype, docname)
        exchange_rate = doc.conversion_rate or 1

        items = doc.items
        for item in items:
            landed_cost = item.landed_cost_voucher_amount or 0
            amount = item.amount or 0
            qty = item.qty or 1
            if qty == 0:
                qty = 1
            trans_landed_cost = landed_cost / exchange_rate
            incoming_rate = (trans_landed_cost + amount) / qty
            item.custom_incoming_rate = incoming_rate
            item.transaction_landed_cost_voucher_amount = trans_landed_cost

        doc.save()
        # frappe.msgprint(f"Custom incoming rates set for {doc_name}")
     
update_incoming_rate(doc)

name: Sales Landed Cost Voucher
Get Items From Sales Invoice IN landed Cost
script:
doctype = frappe.form_dict.get("doctype")
docname = frappe.form_dict.get("docname")

sales_invoice_items=[]
if not doctype or not docname:
    frappe.msgprint("Please provide valid document type and name.")
else:
    doc = frappe.get_doc(doctype, docname)
    if not doc:
        frappe.msgprint("Document not found.")
    else:
        items = doc.items 
        for item in items:
            item_details = {
            'item_code': item.item_code,
            'description': item.item_name,
            'qty': item.qty,
            'rate': item.rate,
            'amount': item.amount,
            'uom': item.uom,
            'custom_containers': item.custom_containers,
            'custom_cartons': item.custom_cartons,
           
        }

        # Append the item dictionary to the sales_invoice_items list
            sales_invoice_items.append(item_details)
frappe.response['message']=sales_invoice_items

name: Calculate Margin Rate
script:
'''Used to calculate the sales invoice new rate with additional shipment cost'''
#Completeed
if doc.distribute_charges_based_on == "Amount":
    
    sales_invoice_items = doc.purchase_receipts
    total_container_value = 0
    total_carton_value=0
    budgeted_cost=0
    
    # Calculate total container value across all items
    for pr in sales_invoice_items:
      
        sales_type = pr.receipt_document_type
        sales_name = pr.receipt_document
        customer=pr.supplier
        sales_doc = frappe.get_doc(sales_type, sales_name)
        # Still getting empty items
        items = sales_doc.items
        total_quantity=sales_doc.total_qty
        for item in items:
            total_container_value = total_container_value + item.custom_containers
            total_carton_value= total_carton_value + item.custom_cartons

        #calculate loss or frappe.ImproperDBConfigurationError
        loss_or_profit = 1-total_container_value
        loss_or_profit_amount=loss_or_profit*doc.total_taxes_and_charges
        doc.profitloss_in_container_amount=loss_or_profit_amount
    # Apply applicable charges to items in the Landed Cost Voucher
    for lc_item in doc.items:
        lc_item_code = lc_item.item_code
        lc_item_qty = lc_item.qty  # Get the quantity of the lc_item

        for pr in sales_invoice_items:
            sales_type = pr.receipt_document_type
            sales_name = pr.receipt_document
            sales_doc = frappe.get_doc(sales_type, sales_name)
            pr_items = sales_doc.items
            
            for pr_item in pr_items:
                if pr_item.item_code == lc_item_code and pr_item.qty == lc_item_qty:
                    pr_container_value = pr_item.custom_containers

                    if total_container_value != 0:
                        # Calculate applicable charges based on item quantity and container ratio
                        item_container_ratio = pr_container_value / total_container_value
                        applicable_amount = item_container_ratio * doc.total_taxes_and_charges
                        lc_item.applicable_charges = applicable_amount

                        new_rate=(applicable_amount + lc_item.amount)/lc_item.qty
                        difference_rate=new_rate - pr_item.rate
                        lc_item.new_rate=new_rate
                        pr_item.price_list_rate=new_rate
                        pr_item.rate=new_rate
                        pr_item.custom_rate_difference=difference_rate
                        break
            sales_doc.custom_total_containers=total_container_value
            sales_doc.custom_total_cartons=total_carton_value
            sales_doc.custom_shipment_cost = doc.name

            sales_doc.save()

name: Total Cartons and Containers SI
script:
total_cartons = 0
total_containers = 0

for item in doc.items:
    # Loop through and add cartons and containers
    total_cartons = total_cartons + item.custom_cartons
    total_containers = total_containers + item.custom_containers
    

doc.custom_total_cartons = total_cartons
doc.custom_total_containers = total_containers

# Ensure the values entered in container_no match with container_quantity
container_no = doc.custom_container_no
container_quantity = doc.custom_container_quantity

if container_quantity and not container_no:
    frappe.throw(f"Container Quantity is provided but Container No is missing.")

elif container_no and container_quantity:
    
    container_no_list = container_no.split(',')
    container_no_count = len(container_no_list)
    
    if container_no_count != container_quantity:
        frappe.throw(f"The number of containers in Container No ({container_no_count}) does not match the Container Quantity ({container_quantity}).")

name: Get Items From Selected Sales Invoice
script:
selected_sales_invoice = frappe.form_dict.get("sales_invoice")
company = frappe.form_dict.get("company")

# Log the selected sales invoice and company for debugging
frappe.log_error(f"Selected Sales Invoice: {selected_sales_invoice}", "Debugging")
frappe.log_error(f"Selected Company: {company}", "Debugging")

if not selected_sales_invoice:
    frappe.throw("Sales invoice is not provided or is invalid.")
if not company:
    frappe.throw("Company is not provided or is invalid.")

purchase_invoice_items = []
transit_numbers = []

def get_accounts(item_code, company):
    try:
        item_doc = frappe.get_doc("Item", item_code)
        item_defaults = item_doc.get("item_defaults")

        if item_defaults:
            for default in item_defaults:
                if default.get("company") == company:
                    this_company = frappe.get_doc("Company", company)
                    income_account = this_company.default_income_account
                    return income_account

        return None

    except Exception as e:
        frappe.log_error(f"Error fetching income account for {item_code} and {company}: {str(e)[:140]}", "Income Account Fetch Error")
        return None

def get_expense_accounts(item_code, company):
    try:
        item_doc = frappe.get_doc("Item", item_code)
        item_defaults = item_doc.item_defaults

        if item_defaults:
            for default in item_defaults:
                if default.get("company") == company:
                    this_company = frappe.get_doc("Company", company)
                    expense_account = this_company.default_expense_account
                    return expense_account

        return None

    except Exception as e:
        frappe.log_error(f"Error fetching expense account for {item_code}: {str(e)[:140]}", "Expense Account Fetch Error")
        return None

try:
    sales_invoice_doc = frappe.get_doc("Sales Invoice", selected_sales_invoice)
    
    # Ensure the sales invoice is submitted before proceeding
    if sales_invoice_doc.docstatus != 1:
        frappe.throw(f"Selected sales invoice must be submitted.")
    
    frappe.log_error(f"Fetched Sales Invoice: {selected_sales_invoice}", "Sales Invoice Document")

    for item in sales_invoice_doc.items:
        # if item.landed_cost_voucher_amount is None or item.qty is None:
        #     frappe.log_error(f"Item {item.item_code} has None value for landed_cost_voucher_amount or qty", "Item Data Error")
        #     continue

        # calculated_rate = (item.landed_cost_voucher_amount / item.qty) + item.rate
        # calculated_amount = calculated_rate * item.qty

        income_account = get_accounts(item.item_code, company)
        expense_account = get_expense_accounts(item.item_code, company)

        item_details = {
            'item_code': item.item_code,
            'item_name': item.item_name,
            'qty': item.qty,
            'rate': item.rate,
            'amount': item.amount,
            'stock_uom':item.stock_uom,
            'stock_qty':item.stock_qty,
            'uom': item.uom,
            'stock_uom': item.stock_uom,
            'custom_containers': item.custom_containers,
            'custom_cartons': item.custom_cartons,
            'income_account': income_account,
            'expense_account': expense_account
        }


        purchase_invoice_items.append(item_details)
        
    # Fetch all transit numbers in the child table 
    for transit in sales_invoice_doc.custom_transit_number:
        # Dictionary to represent each transit_number
        transit_number = {
            'document_type': transit.document_type,
            'company': transit.company,
            'transit_no': transit.transit_no,
            'cancelled_invoice': transit.cancelled_invoice,
        }
        
        # Append the item dictionary to the transit_numbers list
        
        transit_numbers.append(transit_number)
    
    frappe.log_error(f"Items fetched: {len(purchase_invoice_items)}", "Purchase Invoice Items")
    
    # If branch exists fetch it 
    if sales_invoice_doc.branch:
        branch = sales_invoice_doc.branch
    else:
        branch = ''
        
    marka = sales_invoice_doc.marka if sales_invoice_doc.marka else ''

    is_export_sale = sales_invoice_doc.custom_is_export_sale
    container_no = sales_invoice_doc.custom_container_no
    invoice_no = sales_invoice_doc.name
    bill_of_landing = sales_invoice_doc.custom_bill_of_landing
    bil = sales_invoice_doc.custom_bil
    port_of_loading = sales_invoice_doc.custom_port_of_loading
    port_of_discharge = sales_invoice_doc.custom_port_of_discharge
    destination = sales_invoice_doc.custom_destination
    estimated_date_of_departure = sales_invoice_doc.custom_estimated_date_of_departure
    estimated_date_of_arrival = sales_invoice_doc.custom_estimated_date_of_arrival

    shipping_details = {
        'is_export_sale': is_export_sale,
        'branch': branch,
        'marka': marka,
        'container_no': container_no,
        'invoice_no': invoice_no,
        'bill_of_landing': bill_of_landing,
        'port_of_loading': port_of_loading,
        'port_of_discharge': port_of_discharge,
        'destination': destination,
        'bil': bil,
        'estimated_date_of_departure': estimated_date_of_departure,
        'estimated_date_of_arrival': estimated_date_of_arrival
    }

    response_data = {
        'purchase_invoice_items': purchase_invoice_items,
        'shipping_details': shipping_details,
        'transit_numbers': transit_numbers
    }

    frappe.response['message'] = response_data

except Exception as e:
    frappe.log_error(f"Error fetching items from Sales Invoice {selected_sales_invoice}: {str(e)[:140]}", "Sales Invoice Fetch Error")
    frappe.throw(f"Error fetching items from Sales Invoice {selected_sales_invoice}: {str(e)[:140]}")

name: Default Price Rate On Cancel of Shipment Cost
script:
'''Used to calculate the sales invoice new rate with additional shipment cost'''
# Optimized version
if doc.distribute_charges_based_on == "Amount":
    
    sales_invoice_items = doc.purchase_receipts
    total_container_value = 0
    total_carton_value = 0
    
    # Create dictionaries to store data and reduce database calls
    sales_docs = {}
    item_container_map = {}
    
    # First pass: Get all sales documents and calculate totals
    for pr in sales_invoice_items:
        sales_type = pr.receipt_document_type
        sales_name = pr.receipt_document
        
        # Cache sales documents to avoid repeated database calls
        if sales_name not in sales_docs:
            sales_docs[sales_name] = frappe.get_doc(sales_type, sales_name)
            
        sales_doc = sales_docs[sales_name]
        items = sales_doc.items
        
        # Create a mapping of item_code+qty to container value for faster lookups later
        for item in items:
            item_key = f"{item.item_code}_{item.qty}"
            item_container_map[item_key] = item
            total_container_value += item.custom_containers
            total_carton_value += item.custom_cartons
    
    # Calculate loss or profit once
    loss_or_profit = 1 - total_container_value
    loss_or_profit_amount = loss_or_profit * doc.total_taxes_and_charges
    doc.profitloss_in_container_amount = loss_or_profit_amount
    
    # Second pass: Update items in the Landed Cost Voucher
    docs_to_save = set()  # Track which documents need to be saved
    
    for lc_item in doc.items:
        item_key = f"{lc_item.item_code}_{lc_item.qty}"
        
        if item_key in item_container_map and total_container_value != 0:
            pr_item = item_container_map[item_key]
            pr_container_value = pr_item.custom_containers
            
            # Calculate applicable charges based on container ratio
            item_container_ratio = pr_container_value / total_container_value
            applicable_amount = item_container_ratio * doc.total_taxes_and_charges
            lc_item.applicable_charges = applicable_amount
            
            new_rate = (applicable_amount + lc_item.amount) / lc_item.qty
            lc_item.new_rate = new_rate
            pr_item.price_list_rate = lc_item.rate
            pr_item.rate = lc_item.rate
            
            # Get the document this item belongs to
            for sales_name, sales_doc in sales_docs.items():
                if pr_item in sales_doc.items and sales_doc.docstatus == 0:
                    docs_to_save.add(sales_name)
    
    # Update and save all modified documents at once
    for sales_name in docs_to_save:
        sales_doc = sales_docs[sales_name]
        sales_doc.custom_total_containers = total_container_value
        sales_doc.custom_total_cartons = total_carton_value
        sales_doc.save()

name: Automatic Assignment to Accounts Manager
script:
customer = doc.customer
customer_doc = frappe.get_doc("Customer", customer)
emails = [manager for manager in customer_doc.custom_account_managers]

for email in emails:
    # This will now correctly print the email
    new_assign = frappe.get_doc({
        "doctype": "ToDo",
        "allocated_to": email.user,
        "reference_type": "Sales Invoice",
        "reference_name": doc.name,
        "description": f"New sales invoice created {doc.name}",
        "priority": "Medium",
        "date": doc.posting_date,
        "assigned_by": doc.owner
    }).insert(ignore_permissions=True)

name: Close ToDo on Cancel Payment Entry
script:
entry = doc.name 

# Fetch all open ToDo items related to the entry
related_todos = frappe.get_all("ToDo", filters={"status": "Open", "reference_name": entry, "reference_type": "Payment Entry"}, fields=["name"])

# Iterate through each ToDo item and update the status to 'Closed'
for related_todo in related_todos:
    try:
        todo = frappe.get_doc("ToDo", related_todo.name)
        todo.status = "Closed"
        todo.save()
        frappe.db.commit()  # Commit the transaction after each update
    except Exception as e:
        frappe.log_error(message=str(e), title="Error Closing ToDo")

name: Auto Populate Transit Number Sales
script:
current_company_name = frappe.db.get_value('Company', doc.company, 'company_name')

# Create a new child table entry 
transit_number = {
    'document_type': 'Sales Invoice',
    'transit_no': doc.name,
    'company': current_company_name
}

# Append the new entry to the child table
doc.append('custom_transit_number', transit_number)


seen_transit_nos = set()
indices_to_remove = []

# Iterate through the child table to identify duplicates
for idx, transit_no in enumerate(doc.custom_transit_number):
    
    #Create a tuple (document_type, transit_no) to check for duplicates
    transit_key = (transit_no.document_type, transit_no.transit_no)
    
    if transit_key not in seen_transit_nos:
        seen_transit_nos.add(transit_key)
    else:
        # Record the index of the duplicate entry
        indices_to_remove.append(idx)
        # frappe.msgprint(f"Duplicate transit_no of type {transit_no.transit_no} removed", alert=True)

# Remove duplicates
for idx in sorted(indices_to_remove, reverse=True):
    doc.custom_transit_number.pop(idx)

name: Fetch Items With Positive Stock Balance
script:
def fetch_items_with_positive_stock_balance():
    warehouse = frappe.form_dict.get("warehouse")
    
    # if not warehouse:
    #     frappe.throw("Please set Source warehouse")
    
    query = """
        SELECT item.name, bin.actual_qty, bin.warehouse
        FROM `tabItem` AS item
        JOIN `tabBin` AS bin ON item.name = bin.item_code
        WHERE bin.actual_qty > 0 AND bin.warehouse = %s
    """
    
    items = frappe.db.sql(query, (warehouse,), as_dict=1)
    
    # Return the items with their quantities
    return items

frappe.response["message"] = fetch_items_with_positive_stock_balance()

name: Fetch USD Expenses
script:
company = frappe.form_dict.get("company")
posting_date = frappe.form_dict.get("posting_date")
account = frappe.form_dict.get("account")
party_type = frappe.form_dict.get("party_type")
party = frappe.form_dict.get("party")

def fetch_accounts_data(company, posting_date):
    
    account_details = get_account_balance_from_gle(
        company = company,
        posting_date = posting_date,
        account = None,
        party_type=None,
        party=None,
        rounding_loss_allowance=0.0,
        exclude_balance_sheet_accounts=False
    )
        
    accounts_with_new_balance = calculate_new_account_balance(
        company, posting_date, account_details
    )
        
    if not accounts_with_new_balance:
        frappe.msgprint("No outstanding invoices found.")
        return []

    return accounts_with_new_balance
    
    
def get_account_balance_from_gle(
    company, posting_date, account=None, party_type=None, party=None,
    rounding_loss_allowance=0.0, exclude_balance_sheet_accounts=False
):
    account_details = []
    
    if company and posting_date:
        company_currency = frappe.db.get_value("Company", company, "default_currency")
        accounts = frappe.get_all(
            "Account",
            filters={
                "is_group": 0,
                "root_type": ["in", ["Asset", "Liability", "Equity", "Expense"]],
                "account_type": ["!=", "Stock"],
                "company": company,
                "account_currency": ["!=", company_currency]
            },
            fields=["name", "account_type", ]
        )

        accounts = [x["name"] for x in accounts]

        # Now fetch balance for each account
        for account in accounts:
            account_type = frappe.db.get_value("Account", account, "account_type")
            
            # Handle Payable accounts by ensuring party_type and party are passed
            if account_type == "Payable" or account_type == "Receivable" and not party_type:
                continue
                
            # Fetch the balance from the General Ledger (GL Entry)
            account_balance = frappe.db.get_value(
                "GL Entry", {"account": account, "posting_date": ["<=", posting_date]},
                "sum(debit) - sum(credit)"
            )
            
            if account_balance is not None:
                account_details.append({
                    "account": account,
                    "balance": account_balance
                })

    return account_details
    
    
def calculate_new_account_balance(company, posting_date, account_details):
    updated_accounts = []
    company_currency = frappe.db.get_value("Company", company, "default_currency")
    
    for account in account_details:
        
        account_currency = frappe.db.get_value("Account", account["account"], "account_currency")
        
        if account_currency and account_currency != company_currency:
            
            # Fetch the exchange rate using Frappe's built-in methods
            exchange_rate = frappe.db.get_value(
                "Currency Exchange",
                filters={
                    "from_currency": account_currency,
                    "to_currency": company_currency,
                    "date": posting_date
                },
                fieldname="exchange_rate"
            )
            
            # If no exchange rate is found for the exact date, get the latest one before the posting date
            if not exchange_rate:
                exchange_rate = frappe.db.sql("""
                    SELECT exchange_rate
                    FROM `tabCurrency Exchange`
                    WHERE from_currency = %(from_currency)s
                      AND to_currency = %(to_currency)s
                      AND date <= %(posting_date)s
                    ORDER BY date DESC
                    LIMIT 1
                """, {
                    "from_currency": account_currency,
                    "to_currency": company_currency,
                    "posting_date": posting_date
                }, as_dict=True)
            
                exchange_rate = exchange_rate[0]["exchange_rate"] if exchange_rate else 1.0
                
            new_balance = account["balance"] * exchange_rate
            
            account["new_balance"] = new_balance
            account["exchange_rate"] = exchange_rate
            
        else:
            
            account["new_balance"] = account["balance"]
            
        updated_accounts.append(account)
        
    return updated_accounts
    
# frappe.throw(str(fetch_accounts_data(company, posting_date)))
    
frappe.response["message"] = fetch_accounts_data(company, posting_date)

name: Update Work Order Naming
script:
company = frappe.form_dict.get("company")
abbr = frappe.db.get_value("Company", company, "abbr")
if not abbr:
    frappe.throw(_("Company abbreviation not found"))

# Get the current year
current_year = frappe.utils.now_datetime().year

# Fetch the last work order number for this company and year
last_work_order_no = frappe.db.sql("""
    SELECT custom_work_order_no FROM `tabWork Order`
    WHERE custom_work_order_no LIKE %s
    ORDER BY creation DESC LIMIT 1
""", (f"{abbr}-{current_year}-%",))

# Generate the next number
if last_work_order_no:
    last_number = int(last_work_order_no[0][0].split("-")[-1])
    next_number = last_number + 1
else:
    next_number = 1

# Format the next number as a five-digit string
next_number_str = f"{next_number:05d}"

# Combine company abbreviation, year, and next number
work_order_no = f"{abbr}-{current_year}-{next_number_str}"

frappe.response.message=work_order_no

name: Split Production Item
script:
production_plan=frappe.form_dict.get("production_plan")
plan_doc = frappe.get_doc("Production Plan", production_plan)

    # Iterate through each item in the po_items child table
for item in plan_doc.po_items:
    split_no = item.custom_split_no or 1  # Default to 1 if no split_no provided
    if split_no > 1 and item.planned_qty:
        # Calculate the quantity to split
        split_qty = item.planned_qty // split_no
        remainder_qty = item.planned_qty % split_no  # Handle any remainder

        # Create new entries for each split
        new_items = []
        for i in range(split_no):
            new_qty = split_qty
            if i == split_no - 1 and remainder_qty > 0:  # Add remainder to the last split
                new_qty += remainder_qty
            # Create a new item with the split quantity
            new_item = {
                'item_code': item.item_code,
                'planned_qty': new_qty,
                "bom_no":item.bom_no,
                "pending_qty":item.planned_qty,
                "planned_start_date":item.planned_start_date,
                "stock_uom":item.stock_uom,
                
                'custom_split_no': 1  # Reset the split number for the new items
            }
            new_items.append(new_item)
        # Remove the original item and add the new split items
        plan_doc.po_items.remove(item)
        for new_item in new_items:
            plan_doc.append('po_items', new_item)

# Save the updated production plan
plan_doc.save()

frappe.response.message=plan_doc.name

name: Get Latest Item Price
Create Invoices from Operations
script:
# Dictionary to group operations by supplier
supplier_operations_map = {}

# Initialize counter for the +1 increment
counter = 1

# Loop through the child table "Work Order Operation"
for operation in doc.custom_subcontractors:
    supplier = operation.supplier
    currency = operation.currency

    # Only consider operations with status "Completed"
    if operation.status == "Completed" and operation.invoice_created==0:
        # If supplier not in map, create a new list for this supplier
        if supplier not in supplier_operations_map:
            supplier_operations_map[supplier] = []

        # Append the operation to the supplier's list
        supplier_operations_map[supplier].append(operation)

# Create a Purchase Invoice for each supplier
for supplier, operations in supplier_operations_map.items():
    # Create new Purchase Invoice
    purchase_invoice = frappe.new_doc("Purchase Invoice")
    purchase_invoice.currency=currency
    purchase_invoice.supplier = supplier
    purchase_invoice.company = doc.company
    purchase_invoice.set_warehouse = "Store - CW"
    purchase_invoice.update_stock = 0
    purchase_invoice.custom_work_order = doc.name

    # Get the current date and time
    current_datetime = frappe.utils.now()

    # Use the first operation's item code for custom_invoice_no and increment the counter
    first_item_code = operations[0].item
    purchase_invoice.custom_invoice_no = f"{first_item_code}-{current_datetime}-{counter}"

    # Iterate through the operations and add them as items to the Purchase Invoice
    for operation in operations:
        purchase_invoice.append("items", {
            "item_code": operation.item,
            "qty": operation.completed_qty or 1,
            "rate": operation.rate,
            "amount": operation.amount
        })

    # Save and submit the Purchase Invoice
    purchase_invoice.insert()
    purchase_invoice.submit()
    # Mark the operations as "custom_invoice_created = 1"
    for operation in operations:
        frappe.db.set_value(
            "Work Order Operations Item",
            operation.name,  # Assuming "name" is the primary identifier for each operation
            "invoice_created",
            1
        )

   
    # Increment the counter for the next invoice
    counter = counter + 1

    frappe.msgprint("Purchase Invoices successfully created for all suppliers with completed operations.")

name: Split Prod Sub-Assembly
script:
# Fetch the production plan document
production_plan = frappe.form_dict.get('production_plan')
plan_doc = frappe.get_doc("Production Plan", production_plan)

# Helper function to get the global max seq_id across all Production Plan Sub Assembly Items
def get_initial_seq_id():
    all_items = frappe.get_all("Production Plan Sub Assembly Item", fields=["custom_seq_id"])
    return max([item.custom_seq_id for item in all_items], default=0) + 1

# Initialize seq_id_counter with the global maximum seq_id
seq_id_counter = get_initial_seq_id()

# Dictionary to store the seq_id for each unique (item_code, bom_no) combination
seq_id_map = {}

# Collect items to split in a separate list to avoid modifying plan_doc.sub_assembly_items during iteration
items_to_split = []
for item in plan_doc.sub_assembly_items:
    split_no = item.custom_split_no or 1  # Default to 1 if no split_no provided
    if split_no > 1 and item.qty:
        items_to_split.append(item)

# Process each item to be split
for item in items_to_split:
    split_no = item.custom_split_no or 1
    split_qty = item.qty // split_no
    remainder_qty = item.qty % split_no

    # Determine the key for the current item
    item_key = (item.production_item, item.bom_no)

    # Check if we already have a seq_id for this (item_code, bom_no) combination
    if item_key in seq_id_map:
        seq_id = seq_id_map[item_key]  # Reuse the existing seq_id
    else:
        seq_id = seq_id_counter  # Assign a new seq_id
        seq_id_map[item_key] = seq_id  # Store it for future use
        seq_id_counter =seq_id_counter + 1  # Increment for the next unique item combination

    new_items = []
    for i in range(split_no):
        new_qty = split_qty
        if i == split_no - 1 and remainder_qty > 0:
            new_qty += remainder_qty

        # Create a new item with the split quantity and assign the determined seq_id
        new_item = {
            'production_item': item.production_item,
            'item_name': item.item_name,
            'target_warehouse': item.target_warehouse,
            'finished_good': item.finished_good,
            'schedule_date': item.schedule_date,
            'asia_dubai': item.asia_dubai,
            'qty': new_qty,
            'bom_no': item.bom_no,
            'level_bom': item.level_bom,
            'manufacturing_type': item.manufacturing_type,
            'supplier': item.supplier,
            'reference': item.reference,
            'produced_qty': item.produced_qty,
            'purchase_order': item.purchase_order,
            'production_plan_item': item.production_plan_item,
            'received_qty': item.received_qty,
            'uom': item.uom,
            'stock_uom': item.stock_uom,
            'description': item.description,
            'actual_qty': item.actual_qty,
            'projected_qty': item.projected_qty,
            'custom_split_no': 1,  # Reset the split number for the new items
            # 'seq_id': seq_id  # Assign the appropriate seq_id to each split item
        }
        new_items.append(new_item)

    # Remove the original item from plan_doc.sub_assembly_items
    plan_doc.sub_assembly_items.remove(item)

    # Append the newly created split items
    for new_item in new_items:
        plan_doc.append('sub_assembly_items', new_item)

# Save the updated production plan
plan_doc.save()
# Set the response message and reload the document
frappe.response.message = plan_doc.name
plan_doc.reload()

Check Active User
script:
active_sessions = frappe.db.sql("""
    SELECT DISTINCT user
    FROM `tabSessions`
    WHERE TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lastupdate, NOW()) < 60
""", as_dict=True)

# Fetch unique user emails
user_emails = tuple(set(session["user"] for session in active_sessions))

users = []
if user_emails:
    placeholders = ', '.join(['%s'] * len(user_emails))
    users = frappe.db.sql(f"""
        SELECT DISTINCT u.name, u.full_name, al.communication_date
        FROM `tabUser` u
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT user, MAX(communication_date) AS communication_date
            FROM `tabActivity Log`
            WHERE user IN ({placeholders})
            GROUP BY user
        ) al ON u.name = al.user
        WHERE u.name IN ({placeholders})
    """, user_emails * 2, as_dict=True)

# Ensure unique output by name
unique_users = {user["name"]: user for user in users}.values()

frappe.response.message = {
    "count": len(unique_users),
    "users": [
        {
            "full_name": user["full_name"],
            "name": user["name"],
            "last_login": frappe.utils.format_datetime(user["communication_date"]) if user["communication_date"] else "Never"

        }
        for user in unique_users
    ]
}

sales_invoice_items = doc.purchase_receipts

for pr in sales_invoice_items:
    sales_type = pr.receipt_document_type
    sales_name = pr.receipt_document
    sales_doc = frappe.get_doc(sales_type, sales_name)
    
    pr_item_map = {(item.item_code, item.qty): item for item in sales_doc.items}

    for lc_item in doc.items:
        key = (lc_item.item_code, lc_item.qty)
        
        if key in pr_item_map:
            pr_item = pr_item_map[key]

            # Ensure new_rate and rate exist before subtraction
            if lc_item.new_rate is not None and pr_item.rate is not None:
                difference_rate = lc_item.new_rate - pr_item.rate
                pr_item.price_list_rate = lc_item.new_rate
                pr_item.rate = lc_item.new_rate
                pr_item.custom_rate_difference = difference_rate

    sales_doc.custom_shipment_cost = doc.name
    sales_doc.save()

name: Calculate Applicable Charge on Sales Shipment Cost
script:
'''Used to calculate the sales invoice new rate with additional shipment cost'''

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Case 1: Distribute based on Container
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
if doc.distribute_charges_based_on == "Container":
    
    sales_invoice_items = doc.purchase_receipts
    total_container_value = 0
    total_carton_value = 0
    
    # Calculate total container & carton values across all items
    for pr in sales_invoice_items:
        sales_type = pr.receipt_document_type
        sales_name = pr.receipt_document
        sales_doc = frappe.get_doc(sales_type, sales_name)

        for item in sales_doc.items:
            total_container_value = total_container_value + item.custom_containers or 0
            total_carton_value = total_carton_value + item.custom_cartons or 0

    # Container-based allocation
    for lc_item in doc.items:
        lc_item.applicable_charges = 0
        lc_item_code = lc_item.item_code
        lc_item_qty = lc_item.qty

        for pr in sales_invoice_items:
            sales_type = pr.receipt_document_type
            sales_name = pr.receipt_document
            sales_doc = frappe.get_doc(sales_type, sales_name)

            for pr_item in sales_doc.items:
                if pr_item.item_code == lc_item_code and pr_item.qty == lc_item_qty:
                    pr_container_value = pr_item.custom_containers or 0

                    if total_container_value != 0:
                        # Ratio-based distribution
                        item_container_ratio = pr_container_value / total_container_value
                        applicable_amount = item_container_ratio * (doc.total_taxes_and_charges or 0)
                        lc_item.applicable_charges = applicable_amount

                        lc_item.new_rate = (applicable_amount + lc_item.amount) / (lc_item.qty or 1)
                        break 
    
    # Save totals on the sales doc
    sales_doc.custom_total_containers = total_container_value
    sales_doc.custom_total_cartons = total_carton_value
    sales_doc.save()


# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Case 2: Distribute Manually
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
elif doc.distribute_charges_based_on == "Distribute Manually":
    for lc_item in doc.items:
        if not lc_item.applicable_charges or lc_item.applicable_charges <= 0:
            frappe.throw(f"Applicable Charges for item {lc_item.item_code} must be entered manually")

        lc_item.new_rate = (lc_item.applicable_charges + lc_item.amount) / (lc_item.qty or 1)


# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Case 3: Distribute based on Amount (like ERPNext default LCV)
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
elif doc.distribute_charges_based_on == "Amount":
    total_amount = sum(lc_item.amount for lc_item in doc.items if lc_item.amount)
    if total_amount <= 0:
        frappe.throw("Total Amount cannot be zero for distribution based on Amount")

    for lc_item in doc.items:
        item_ratio = (lc_item.amount or 0) / total_amount
        applicable_amount = item_ratio * (doc.total_taxes_and_charges or 0)
        lc_item.applicable_charges = applicable_amount
        lc_item.new_rate = (applicable_amount + lc_item.amount) / (lc_item.qty or 1)
        

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Case 4: Distribute based on Qty (like ERPNext default LCV)
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
elif doc.distribute_charges_based_on == "Qty":
    total_qty = sum(lc_item.qty for lc_item in doc.items if lc_item.qty)
    if total_qty <= 0:
        frappe.throw("Total Quantity cannot be zero for distribution based on Qty")

    for lc_item in doc.items:
        item_ratio = (lc_item.qty or 0) / total_qty
        applicable_amount = item_ratio * (doc.total_taxes_and_charges or 0)
        lc_item.applicable_charges = applicable_amount
        lc_item.new_rate = (applicable_amount + lc_item.amount) / (lc_item.qty or 1)

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# ✅ Final Validation: no item should have None or 0 applicable_charges
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
if doc.items:
    for item in doc.items:
        if not item.applicable_charges or item.applicable_charges <= 0:
            frappe.throw(f"Applicable Charges for item {item.item_code} cannot be None or 0")


# '''Used to calculate the sales invoice new rate with additional shipment cost'''
# #Completeed
# if doc.distribute_charges_based_on == "Amount":
    
#     sales_invoice_items = doc.purchase_receipts
#     total_container_value = 0
#     total_carton_value=0
#     budgeted_cost=0
    
#     # Calculate total container value across all items
#     for pr in sales_invoice_items:
      
#         sales_type = pr.receipt_document_type
#         sales_name = pr.receipt_document
#         customer=pr.supplier
#         sales_doc = frappe.get_doc(sales_type, sales_name)
#         # Still getting empty items
#         items = sales_doc.items
#         total_quantity=sales_doc.total_qty
#         for item in items:
#             total_container_value = total_container_value + item.custom_containers
#             total_carton_value= total_carton_value + item.custom_cartons

#         #calculate loss or frappe.ImproperDBConfigurationError
#     loss_or_profit = 1-total_container_value
#     loss_or_profit_amount=loss_or_profit*doc.total_taxes_and_charges
#     doc.profitloss_in_container_amount=loss_or_profit_amount
        
#     # Apply applicable charges to items in the Landed Cost Voucher
#     for lc_item in doc.items:
#         item.applicable_charge = 0
#         lc_item_code = lc_item.item_code

#                     pr_container_value = pr_item.custom_containers

name: Display Party Type
script: doc.custom_party_typer=doc.party_type

name: Fetch Default Cost Center and Populate
Get Customers or Suppliers By Company
script:
company = frappe.form_dict.get("company")
parenttype = frappe.form_dict.get("parenttype")
restrict_selling_settings = frappe.db.get_single_value("Selling Settings", "custom_restrict_allowed_customers_by_companies")
restrict_buying_settings = frappe.db.get_single_value("Buying Settings", "custom_restrict_allowed_suppliers_by_companies")

if not company:
    frappe.throw("Company is required")

def get_allowed_parties_by_company(company: str, direct_type: str, group_type: str, group_link_field: str) -> list:
    """
    Fetches allowed parties (customers or suppliers) for a company based on:
    - Direct Party Accounts (e.g., Customer or Supplier)
    - Group Party Accounts (e.g., Customer Group or Supplier Group)

    :param company: Selected Company
    :param direct_type: "Customer" or "Supplier"
    :param group_type: "Customer Group" or "Supplier Group"
    :param group_link_field: Field in direct doctype pointing to group (e.g., "customer_group")
    :return: List of party names
    """

    # Direct parties with a Party Account for the company
    direct_parties = frappe.db.get_all(
        "Party Account",
        filters={"company": company, "parenttype": direct_type},
        pluck="parent"
    )

    # Groups that have Party Account for the company
    allowed_groups = frappe.db.get_all(
        "Party Account",
        filters={"company": company, "parenttype": group_type},
        pluck="parent"
    )

    group_parties = []
    if allowed_groups:
        group_parties = frappe.db.get_all(
            direct_type,
            filters={group_link_field: ["in", allowed_groups]},
            pluck="name"
        )

    return list(set(direct_parties + group_parties))

allowed_parties = []
if parenttype == "Customer":
    allowed_parties = get_allowed_parties_by_company(
        company, direct_type="Customer", group_type="Customer Group", group_link_field="customer_group"
    )

elif parenttype == "Supplier":
        allowed_parties = get_allowed_parties_by_company(
            company, direct_type="Supplier", group_type="Supplier Group", group_link_field="supplier_group"
        )


frappe.response["message"] = {
    "allowed_parties": allowed_parties,
    "restrict_selling_settings": restrict_selling_settings,
    "restrict_buying_settings": restrict_buying_settings
}

Please take the necessary action.

""" frappe.sendmail( recipients=recipients, subject=subject, message=message, delayed=False )

name: Sales Invoice Overdue Notification
script:
# Constants ROLE_NAME = "Sales Invigilator" INVOICE_DOCTYPE = "Sales Invoice" SITE_URL = "https://erp.banadirgroup.com/app/sales-invoice/" # Step 1: Get users with the "Sales Invigilator" role role_users = frappe.get_all( "Has Role", filters={"role": ROLE_NAME}, fields=["parent as user"] ) # Step 2: Build a mapping of user -> companies they have access to user_company_map = {} for user_entry in role_users: user = user_entry.user allowed_companies = frappe.get_all( "User Permission", filters={ "user": user, "allow": "Company" }, fields=["for_value"] ) # If user has specific company permissions, use those if allowed_companies: user_company_map[user] = [c.for_value for c in allowed_companies] # Step 3: Get all overdue invoices (status = Overdue, outstanding > 0) due_invoices = frappe.get_all( INVOICE_DOCTYPE, filters={ "status": "Overdue", "outstanding_amount": [">", 0], "company":"Banadir ready mix ltd" }, fields=["name", "customer", "due_date", "outstanding_amount", "company"] ) # Step 4: For each invoice, notify users who have access to its company for invoice in due_invoices: invoice_company = invoice.company invoice_link = f"{SITE_URL}{invoice.name}" subject = f"🔔 Overdue Invoice {invoice.name} | {invoice.customer} | {frappe.utils.fmt_money(invoice.outstanding_amount)}" message = f"""

This is a reminder that Sales Invoice {invoice.name} for customer {invoice.customer} is overdue.

  • Due Date: {invoice.due_date}
  • Outstanding Amount: {frappe.utils.fmt_money(invoice.outstanding_amount)}
  • Company: {invoice_company}

🔗 View Invoice in ERP

Please take the necessary action.

""" # Step 5: Check which users have access to this company and send notifications for user, companies in user_company_map.items(): if invoice_company in companies: frappe.get_doc({ "doctype": "Notification Log", "subject": subject, "email_content": message, "for_user": user, "type": "Alert", "document_type": INVOICE_DOCTYPE, "document_name": invoice.name }).insert(ignore_permissions=True) # frappe.db.commit()

name: Fetch Seq Id From Linked Purchase Order
Auto Submit Subcontracting Order
Archive Transit Number on Cancel PI
Archive Transit Number on Cancel SI
Sync Emmployee Checkin
Get The Purchase Invoice Details
script:
purchase_invoice = frappe.form_dict.get('purchase_invoice')
pi = frappe.get_doc("Purchase Invoice", purchase_invoice)

result = []

for item in pi.items:
	if not item.expense_account:
		continue

	result.append({
		"expense_account": item.expense_account,
		"account_currency": pi.currency,
		"exchange_rate": pi.conversion_rate or 1,
		"description": item.expense_account,
		"amount": item.net_amount,
		"cost_center": item.cost_center
	})

frappe.response['message']=result

name: Send Mail For Two Checkin Within A Day
script:
# Get today's date
today_date = frappe.utils.today()

# Fetch all check-ins for today
checkins = frappe.db.sql("""
    SELECT employee, employee_name, log_type, time
    FROM `tabEmployee Checkin`
    WHERE DATE(time) = %s
    """, (today_date,), as_dict=True)

# Organize check-ins by employee
employee_logs = {}
for log in checkins:
    employee = log['employee']
    log_type = log['log_type']

    # Initialize log tracking for each employee
    if employee not in employee_logs:
        employee_logs[employee] = {'IN': False, 'OUT': False}
    
    # Update log status based on log_type
    if log_type == 'IN':
        employee_logs[employee]['IN'] = True
    elif log_type == 'OUT':
        employee_logs[employee]['OUT'] = True

# Identify employees with check-in but no check-out
employees_missing_out = [emp for emp, logs in employee_logs.items() if logs['IN'] and not logs['OUT']]

if employees_missing_out:
    # Prepare email content
    recipients = [frappe.get_value('Employee', emp, 'user_id') for emp in employees_missing_out]
    subject = 'Missing Check-out Log for Today'
    message = f"The following employees have not checked out today: {', '.join(employees_missing_out)}"

    # Send email notification
    frappe.sendmail(
        recipients='amiingeesle@gmail.com',
        subject=subject,
        message=message,
    )

name: Close Sales Order If Past Valid Till Date
Calculate Shipping Remaining Days
script:
# Update remaining days for Sales Invoices
sales_invoices = frappe.get_all("Sales Invoice", filters={"docstatus": 1}, fields=["name", "custom_estimated_date_of_arrival"])
today = frappe.utils.nowdate()

for doc in sales_invoices:
    estimated_arrival = doc.custom_estimated_date_of_arrival
    if estimated_arrival:
        difference = frappe.utils.date_diff(estimated_arrival, today)
        frappe.db.set_value("Sales Invoice", doc.name, "custom_remaining_days", difference, update_modified=False)

# Update remaining days for Purchase Invoices
purchase_invoices = frappe.get_all("Purchase Invoice", filters={"docstatus": 1}, fields=["name", "custom_estimated_date_of_arrival"])

for doc in purchase_invoices:
    estimated_arrival = doc.custom_estimated_date_of_arrival
    if estimated_arrival:
        difference = frappe.utils.date_diff(estimated_arrival, today)
        frappe.db.set_value("Purchase Invoice", doc.name, "custom_remaining_days", difference, update_modified=False)

name: Ensure Fetching Container Conversion
script:
for item in doc.items:
    if not item.item_code:
        continue

    # Load Item master
    item_doc = frappe.get_doc("Item", item.item_code)

    container_conversion = None
    carton_conversion = None

    # Read UOM conversions
    for uom_row in item_doc.uoms:
        if uom_row.uom == "Container":
            container_conversion = uom_row.conversion_factor

        elif uom_row.uom == "Carton":
            carton_conversion = uom_row.conversion_factor

    # ---- Update Container ----
    if (
        container_conversion
        and frappe.utils.flt(item.container_conversion_factor)
            != frappe.utils.flt(container_conversion)
    ):
        frappe.db.set_value(
            item.doctype,
            item.name,
            "container_conversion_factor",
            container_conversion,
            update_modified=False
        )

    # ---- Update Carton ----
    if (
        carton_conversion
        and frappe.utils.flt(item.carton_conversion_factor)
            != frappe.utils.flt(carton_conversion)
    ):
        frappe.db.set_value(
            item.doctype,
            item.name,
            "carton_conversion_factor",
            carton_conversion,
            update_modified=False
        )
